## HughesLittle Investment Management Sells TSM Shares

Routine institutional sale with no disclosed rationale; not a fundamental signal for TSM. Background flow only.

- HughesLittle Investment Management disclosed a sale of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM) shares.
- Routine 13F-style position reduction; no size, price, or investment rationale provided in the headline.
- Classifier assigns low confidence and no fundamental signal.
- One of multiple TSM institutional flow disclosures appearing in the same batch.
